author: chatgpt-orchestrator
body:
TASK_PACKET:
task_id: issue-23-bridge-dry-run
project: KOHEE LIST
lane: AUTOMATION_PLATFORM
risk: MEDIUM
mode: dry-run
goal: Select exactly one active issue #23 task packet without GitHub writes.
allowed_files: scripts/issue-task-bridge.mjs, scripts/test-issue-task-bridge.mjs
forbidden_areas: D1/schema/migration, auth/session/security, CSV import/reset, public data behavior, deploy/secrets
checks: npm run test:unit, node scripts/issue-task-bridge.mjs scripts/fixtures/issue-23-comments-one-active.json, git diff --check
stop_condition: bridge returns SELECT_TASK_DRY_RUN or a HOLD/FIX_REQUIRED report
report_format: Status / Blocker / Next action / Evidence
merge_policy: strict-evidence-gate
expires_at: 2999-01-01T00:00:00Z
